Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators.FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate fundamental matrices

    • Uses of FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators declared as FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators that return FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Returns reference to listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.estimators with parameters of type FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimator.setListener​(FundamentalMatrixRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Sets listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
